headline: Assessing Kimco Realty (KIM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Intrinsic Discount Debate
summary: Why Kimco Realty Stock Is Drawing Investor Attention Kimco Realty (KIM) is back on investor radars after a recent price move, with the stock up about 3% over the past month and roughly 2% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Kimco Realty. While the latest 1-day share price return slipped 0.37% to close at $24.08, Kimco Realty’s 1-month share price return of 2.99% and year to date share price return of 20.04% point to momentum that aligns with its 1-year total shareholder return...
